axiom_schema_candidates.justification: The relation "produced by" explicitly links a product or product series to the entity that manufactures or produces it, as indicated by the domain hint "Product" and the range hint "Manufacturer". In the seed ontology, potential manufacturer classes include broadcaster, record label, and sports league, all of which are organizations capable of producing products.
